name: @hope-ui/presets
description: hope-ui presets — one tree-shakable package, per-preset subpaths (@hope-ui/presets/hope is the default visual identity). Each preset ships a Tailwind v4 CSS file (design tokens as --hope-* CSS variables + an @theme inline mapping to clean utilities) plus a runtime recipe map: import the CSS into your Tailwind entry, pass the recipe map to <ThemeProvider>.
